description: Parametric insurance protocol on Chainlink CRE. Insurance pools with custom trigger conditions, multi-source data verification, AI adjudication, and instant on-chain payouts.

modules.name: Insurance Marketplace
modules.description: Browse, search, and explore available insurance pools. View pool details, monitoring data, agreements, and get AI-powered advice.

screens.name: Policies List
screens.description: Grid/table view of all available insurance pools with search, type filtering, and view toggle (card/table).

sections.emptyMessage: No insurance pools found. Create the first one!

appFlows.name: Browse Available Pools

steps.description: Page loads with loading skeleton
Fetch pool list from ClaimZeroFactory contract via thirdweb SDK
Render pool cards/table with pool data
User can search, filter by type, toggle card/table view

appFlows.outcome: User sees all available insurance pools with key metrics

appFlows.name: Navigate to Pool Detail
appFlows.trigger: User clicks on a pool card or View Details button

steps.description: Click pool card triggers Next.js router navigation
Navigate to /policies/[address] with pool contract address

appFlows.outcome: User lands on pool detail page for the selected pool

screens.name: Pool Detail
screens.description: Detailed view of an insurance pool showing monitoring chart, trigger conditions, agreements, deposit dialog, and AI advisor chat.

sections.title: Pool: Weather Protection — NYC
sections.subtitle: Parametric weather insurance for New York City area

sections.title: Pool Monitoring
sections.description: Real-time monitoring of trigger conditions and pool health

sections.title: Agreement Terms
sections.description: Review the full insurance agreement including coverage terms, exclusions, and payout conditions.

fields.label: Capabilities
fields.value: Pool analysis, risk assessment, coverage recommendations

dialogs.title: Deposit to Pool
dialogs.description: Add liquidity to this insurance pool to earn yield from premiums.

appFlows.name: View Pool Details

steps.description: Page loads, extracts pool address from URL params
Read pool data from InsurancePool contract (TVL, premium, coverage, state)
Read trigger conditions and data source configuration
Render monitoring chart, stats, trigger conditions, and agreements

appFlows.outcome: User sees full pool details with real-time monitoring data

appFlows.name: Chat with AI Advisor
appFlows.trigger: User types a question in the AI advisor panel

steps.description: User enters question in AI advisor chat input
POST /api/ai-chat with message and pool context
Claude Service processes query with pool data context
Stream AI response back to chat panel

appFlows.outcome: User receives AI-powered analysis and recommendations about the pool

appFlows.name: Deposit Liquidity
appFlows.trigger: User clicks Deposit button and fills deposit dialog

steps.description: Open deposit dialog with amount and duration fields
User enters amount and selects lock duration
Approve CZUSD spending via ERC-20 approve()
Call InsurancePool.deposit() with amount
Show transaction confirmation and updated TVL

appFlows.outcome: User has deposited liquidity and pool TVL is updated

apiEndpoints.description: AI advisor endpoint. Sends user message with pool context to Claude Service for streaming analysis and recommendations.

request.poolAddress: string — contract address of the pool

response.stream: ReadableStream — SSE stream of AI response chunks

serverFlow.description: Validate message is non-empty string
Build system prompt with pool context and insurance domain knowledge
Call Claude Service (POST /chat) with streaming enabled
Pipe streaming response back to client as SSE

errorResponses.when: Request body has no message field
Claude Service returns error or is unreachable

modules.name: Policy Acquisition
modules.description: Multi-step wizard for purchasing insurance coverage. Eligibility check, payment processing via Stripe or crypto, and policy NFT minting.

screens.name: Acquire Coverage
screens.description: 3-step wizard: Eligibility verification → Payment (Stripe or crypto) → Confirmation with policy NFT mint.

sections.title: Get Coverage
sections.subtitle: Complete the steps below to purchase your insurance policy

fields.name: reviewTerms
fields.label: I agree to the insurance terms and conditions

fields.name: reviewPayout
fields.label: I understand payouts are automatic and parametric

appFlows.name: Purchase Policy with Credit Card
appFlows.trigger: User completes eligibility and selects Stripe payment

steps.description: User fills eligibility form (location, property type, coverage amount)
POST /api/eligibility to verify user meets pool requirements
Show payment step with Stripe Elements form
POST /api/stripe-payment to create PaymentIntent
Stripe processes payment and sends webhook
POST /api/stripe-webhook receives confirmation
Mint PolicyNFT to user's wallet via InsurancePool.purchasePolicy()
Show confirmation with policy NFT details and coverage summary

appFlows.outcome: User holds a PolicyNFT representing their insurance coverage

appFlows.name: Purchase Policy with CZUSD
appFlows.trigger: User completes eligibility and selects crypto payment

steps.description: User fills eligibility form
POST /api/eligibility to verify requirements
Show crypto payment with CZUSD amount
Approve CZUSD spending via ERC-20 approve()
Call InsurancePool.purchasePolicy() with premium payment
Show confirmation with policy NFT and tx hash

appFlows.outcome: User holds a PolicyNFT, premium paid in CZUSD on-chain

apiEndpoints.description: Verify user eligibility for a specific insurance pool based on location, property type, and coverage requirements.

serverFlow.description: Validate required fields (poolAddress, location, coverageAmount)
Check EligibilityRegistry contract for pool-specific rules
Calculate premium based on coverage amount and pool parameters
Return eligibility status with premium quote

errorResponses.description: User does not meet pool requirements
errorResponses.when: Location or property type excluded by pool rules

apiEndpoints.description: Create a Stripe PaymentIntent for insurance premium payment. Returns client secret for Stripe Elements.

request.userAddress: string — wallet address for policy minting

serverFlow.description: Validate amount, poolAddress, and userAddress
Create Stripe PaymentIntent with metadata (poolAddress, userAddress, coverageAmount)
Return client_secret for frontend Stripe Elements

apiEndpoints.description: Stripe webhook handler. On successful payment, triggers on-chain policy minting via InsurancePool contract.

request.body: Stripe webhook event payload (raw body for signature verification)

serverFlow.description: Verify Stripe webhook signature using STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET
Extract payment metadata (poolAddress, userAddress, coverageAmount)
Call InsurancePool.purchasePolicy() with server wallet to mint PolicyNFT
Return 200 acknowledgment to Stripe

errorResponses.when: Contract call reverts or wallet has insufficient gas

modules.name: My Coverage
modules.description: Dashboard showing user's active policies, coverage status, and claim history. Filter by status, view policy details.

screens.name: My Coverage
screens.description: Cards grid showing user's policies with status filter tabs (Active, Settled, Expired, All). Each card shows coverage details and links to pool.

sections.title: My Coverage
sections.subtitle: Your active insurance policies and claim history

content.emptyMessage: You don't have any policies yet. Browse the marketplace to get started.

appFlows.name: View My Policies

steps.description: Page loads with auth check — user must be connected
Query PolicyNFT contract for user's token IDs
For each token, read policy details from InsurancePool
Render policy cards grouped by status (Active, Settled, Expired)

appFlows.outcome: User sees all their insurance policies with current status and coverage details

modules.name: Pool Creation
modules.description: 4-step wizard for creating new insurance pools. Configure data sources, trigger conditions, agreements, and deploy the pool contract.

screens.name: Create Pool
screens.description: 4-step wizard: Data Sources → Trigger Conditions → Agreements → Deploy. Creates an InsurancePool via ClaimZeroFactory.

sections.title: Create Insurance Pool
sections.subtitle: Configure and deploy a new parametric insurance pool

fields.name: reviewAll
fields.label: I have reviewed all pool parameters

appFlows.name: Create and Deploy Pool
appFlows.trigger: Admin fills all wizard steps and clicks Deploy

steps.description: User configures data sources (primary + secondary URLs, poll interval)
User defines trigger conditions (metric, operator, threshold, duration)
User sets agreement terms (name, premium, coverage, deposit)
User reviews all parameters and enters initial deposit
Approve CZUSD spending for initial deposit
Call ClaimZeroFactory.createPool() with all parameters
POST /api/activate-pool to register CRE workflow
CRE Gateway creates cron trigger + HTTP client + consensus workflow
Show success with new pool address and link to pool detail

appFlows.outcome: New insurance pool is deployed with CRE monitoring workflow active

apiEndpoints.description: Activate a newly created insurance pool by registering its CRE workflow. Sets up cron trigger, HTTP data sources, consensus, and EVM write actions.

serverFlow.description: Verify caller is pool creator (admin)
Validate pool exists on-chain and is in FUNDING state
Register CRE workflow via CRE Gateway API (cron trigger + HTTP sources + consensus + EVM write)
Configure Gemini TEE for AI adjudication fallback
Return workflow ID and activation confirmation

errorResponses.when: Connected wallet doesn't match pool creator address
CRE API is unreachable or rejects workflow config

modules.name: Payments Infrastructure
modules.description: Cross-cutting payment infrastructure. Stripe integration for fiat payments, CZUSD stablecoin for on-chain payments, and currency conversion.

modules.name: ACE Compliance Engine
modules.description: Automated Compliance Engine with on-chain policy engines. Enforces solvency, KYC, sanctions, premium volume, eligibility, and cooling-off rules.

flows.name: Browse and Explore Pools
flows.description: User browses the marketplace, searches and filters pools, views pool details, and explores coverage options.
flows.trigger: User visits the app or navigates to /policies

steps.action: Navigate to /policies marketplace page
Search and filter pools by type
Click on a pool card to view details
Read pool data from InsurancePool contract
steps.expectedResult: Pool details loaded (TVL, premium, coverage, state)

steps.action: View monitoring chart, trigger conditions, and agreements
steps.expectedResult: Full pool detail rendered with real-time data

flows.outcome: User has explored the marketplace and understands available insurance options

flows.name: Purchase Insurance Policy
flows.description: Complete end-to-end flow from pool selection through eligibility check, payment, and policy NFT minting.
flows.trigger: User clicks Get Coverage on a pool detail page

steps.action: Click Get Coverage button on pool detail
Fill eligibility form (location, property type, coverage amount)
Submit eligibility check
Select payment method (Stripe or CZUSD)
Create Stripe PaymentIntent (if fiat)
Process payment via Stripe or approve CZUSD on-chain
Mint PolicyNFT to user's wallet
Show confirmation with policy details
steps.expectedResult: Policy NFT ID and coverage summary displayed

flows.outcome: User holds a PolicyNFT and has active insurance coverage

flows.name: Create Insurance Pool
flows.description: Admin creates a new parametric insurance pool with custom data sources, trigger conditions, and deploys it with CRE monitoring.
flows.trigger: Admin clicks Create Pool and begins the wizard

steps.action: Navigate to /create wizard
Configure data sources (primary + secondary URLs, poll interval)
Define trigger conditions (metric, operator, threshold, duration)
Set agreement terms (name, premium, coverage limits, text)
Deploy pool via ClaimZeroFactory.createPool()
Activate CRE workflow for the pool
CRE Gateway sets up cron trigger + HTTP client + consensus

flows.outcome: New insurance pool is live with automated CRE monitoring and trigger detection

flows.name: View My Coverage
flows.description: User checks their active policies, coverage status, and any settled claims.
flows.trigger: User navigates to /coverage from header nav

steps.action: Navigate to /coverage dashboard
Query PolicyNFT balanceOf for connected wallet
Read policy details for each token from InsurancePool
Display policy cards with status tabs (Active/Settled/All)

flows.outcome: User sees complete overview of their insurance portfolio

flows.name: AI Advisor Chat
flows.description: User interacts with AI advisor on a pool detail page to get risk analysis, coverage recommendations, and pool insights.
flows.trigger: User types a question in the AI advisor panel on pool detail

steps.action: User types question in AI advisor chat input
POST /api/ai-chat with message and pool context
Claude Service processes query with insurance domain context
Stream response tokens into chat panel

flows.outcome: User receives personalized AI analysis about the insurance pool

flows.name: CRE Trigger & Settlement
flows.description: Automated flow: CRE detects trigger condition via multi-source data, AI adjudicates in TEE, and payouts execute on-chain.
flows.trigger: CRE cron trigger fires and fetches data from configured sources

steps.action: CRE cron trigger fires on schedule
HTTP Client fetches data from primary + secondary sources
CRE Consensus validates multi-source data agreement
Gemini TEE adjudicates claim based on trigger data and policy terms
CRERouter.handleCallback() receives settlement decision
InsurancePool.settle() executes payouts to all affected PolicyNFT holders
ACE PolicyEngine validates compliance (solvency, sanctions, cooling-off)

flows.outcome: Policyholders receive automatic payouts when trigger conditions are met — no claims process needed

contracts.name: ClaimZeroFactory
contracts.description: Factory contract that creates and registers new InsurancePool instances.

functions.name: createPool
functions.description: Deploy a new InsurancePool with specified parameters

functions.name: getPool
functions.description: Get pool address by index

functions.name: poolCount
functions.description: Total number of deployed pools

contracts.name: InsurancePool
contracts.description: Core insurance pool contract. Manages deposits, policies, trigger conditions, and settlement payouts.

functions.name: deposit
functions.description: Deposit liquidity into the pool

functions.name: purchasePolicy
functions.description: Purchase a policy and mint PolicyNFT

functions.name: settle
functions.description: Settle the pool and distribute payouts

functions.name: getPoolState
functions.description: Get current pool state (FUNDING, ACTIVE, SETTLED, etc.)

functions.name: totalValueLocked
functions.description: Total deposits in the pool

functions.name: PoolSettled
functions.description: Emitted when pool settles and payouts are distributed

contracts.name: PolicyNFT
contracts.description: ERC-721 NFT representing insurance policies. Each token stores coverage details and payout status.

functions.name: mint
functions.description: Mint a new policy NFT

functions.name: getPolicyData
functions.description: Read policy metadata for a token

functions.name: balanceOf
functions.description: Number of policies held by address

contracts.name: CRERouter
contracts.description: Routes CRE callback data to the appropriate InsurancePool for trigger evaluation and settlement.

functions.name: handleCallback
functions.description: Process CRE workflow callback with trigger data

functions.name: registerPool
functions.description: Register a pool for CRE callbacks

contracts.name: EligibilityRegistry
contracts.description: On-chain registry of eligibility rules per pool. Stores location restrictions, property types, and coverage limits.

functions.name: setRules
functions.description: Set eligibility rules for a pool

functions.name: checkEligibility
functions.description: Check if a user meets pool requirements

contracts.name: ComplianceConsumer
contracts.description: CRE consumer that feeds compliance data (KYC, sanctions) into the ACE PolicyEngine.

functions.name: requestComplianceCheck
functions.description: Request off-chain compliance verification via CRE

functions.name: fulfillCompliance
functions.description: CRE callback with compliance result

contracts.name: CZUSDConsumer
contracts.description: Consumer contract for CZUSD stablecoin operations — minting, burning, and cross-chain transfers.

functions.name: mint
functions.description: Mint CZUSD tokens

functions.name: burn
functions.description: Burn CZUSD tokens

contracts.name: CZUSD
contracts.description: ERC-20 stablecoin (pegged to CZUSD) used for premiums, deposits, and payouts.

functions.name: approve
functions.description: Approve spending allowance

functions.name: transfer
functions.description: Transfer tokens

functions.name: balanceOf
functions.description: Get token balance

contracts.name: PolicyEngine
contracts.description: ACE base policy engine that orchestrates compliance checks across all registered policies.

functions.name: evaluate
functions.description: Run all registered policies against a transaction

functions.name: registerPolicy
functions.description: Register a new compliance policy

contracts.name: SolvencyPolicy
contracts.description: ACE policy ensuring pool maintains minimum solvency ratio before allowing new policies.

functions.name: check
functions.description: Verify pool solvency ratio meets threshold

contracts.name: PremiumVolumePolicy
contracts.description: ACE policy enforcing premium volume limits to prevent over-exposure.

functions.name: check
functions.description: Verify premium volume within acceptable range

contracts.name: EligibilityPolicy
contracts.description: ACE policy for on-chain eligibility verification during policy purchase.

functions.name: check
functions.description: Verify buyer eligibility

contracts.name: KYCPolicy
contracts.description: ACE policy enforcing KYC requirements for high-value policies.

functions.name: check
functions.description: Verify KYC status

contracts.name: SanctionsPolicy
contracts.description: ACE policy screening against sanctions lists.

functions.name: check
functions.description: Screen address against sanctions

contracts.name: CoolingOffPolicy
contracts.description: ACE policy enforcing cooling-off periods after policy purchase or claim.

functions.name: check
functions.description: Verify cooling-off period has elapsed

contracts.name: UnifiedExtractor
contracts.description: ACE utility contract for extracting and normalizing data from various contract call contexts.

functions.name: extract
functions.description: Extract structured data from raw context bytes

externalAPIs.name: Stripe API
externalAPIs.description: Payment processing for fiat-to-crypto premium payments. Creates PaymentIntents and handles webhooks.

endpoints.description: Create a PaymentIntent for premium payment

aiServices.name: Claude Service
aiServices.description: AI advisor for pool analysis, risk assessment, and coverage recommendations. Accessed via streaming POST /chat endpoint.

aiServices.name: Gemini TEE
aiServices.description: AI adjudication engine running inside CRE TEE. Evaluates trigger data against policy terms for automated claim settlement.

sharedServices.name: CRE Gateway
sharedServices.description: Chainlink Compute Runtime Environment gateway. Manages cron triggers, HTTP data fetching, multi-source consensus, and EVM write callbacks.

endpoints.description: Register a new CRE workflow with trigger/action config

sharedServices.name: Thirdweb Connect
sharedServices.description: Authentication and wallet connection. Supports email, social login, and WalletConnect. Provides embedded wallets.

fileStructure.packages/webapp/src/app/page.tsx: Home page — landing with CTA to marketplace
fileStructure.packages/webapp/src/app/layout.tsx: Root layout with providers (auth, wallet, theme)
fileStructure.packages/webapp/src/app/policies/policie: policies-list — Client component with pool cards/table
fileStructure.packages/webapp/src/app/policies/[addres: pool-detail — Client component with monitoring, agreements, AI
fileStructure.packages/webapp/src/app/coverage/coverag: my-coverage — Policy cards with status filters
fileStructure.packages/webapp/src/app/api/stripe-webho: stripe-webhook — Stripe webhook handler + on-chain minting
claim-zero-factory — Factory for deploying InsurancePool contracts
fileStructure.packages/contracts/src/InsurancePool.sol: insurance-pool — Core pool contract (deposits, policies, settlement)
fileStructure.packages/contracts/src/CRERouter.sol: cre-router — Routes CRE callbacks to pools
